1642290.name: Aaliyah Edwards
1642290.injDetail: Edwards (knee) is out for Wednesday's game against Indiana.

1629501.name: Alanna Smith
1629501.injDetail: Smith (leg) is listed as out for Wednesday's game versus Portland.

1642293.name: Alissa Pili
1642293.injDetail: Pili (coach's decision) is out for Wednesday's game against the Mercury.

1630993.name: Anneli Maley
1630993.injDetail: Maley (coach's decision) is out for Wednesday's game against the Sky.

1643437.name: Ashlon Jackson
1643437.injDetail: Jackson (coach's decision) is listed as out for Wednesday's game against the Fever.

203398.name: Brittney Griner
203398.injDetail: Griner (knee) is out for Wednesday's game against Indiana.

1628279.name: Brittney Sykes
1628279.injDetail: Head coach Sandy Brondello said Thursday that Sykes (foot) has taken part in individual work at practice recently, Zulfi Sheikh of Sportsnet reports.

1643424.name: Costanza Verona
1643424.injDetail: Verona (coach's decision) won't play Wednesday in Portland.

203024.name: Damiris Dantas
203024.injDetail: Dantas (knee) is out for Wednesday's game against the Sun.

1643488.name: Emma Cechova
1643488.injDetail: Cechova (knee) was diagnosed with a torn ACL in her right knee and will undergo surgery, Meghan L. Hall of USA Today reports. She will miss the remainder of the season.

1629496.name: Ezi Magbegor
1629496.injDetail: Magbegor (face) was diagnosed with a facial fracture and will be "reevaluated in the next couple of weeks," Percy Allen of the Seattle Times reports.

1642817.name: Hailey Van Lith
1642817.injDetail: Van Lith (coach's decision) is out for Wednesday's game in Indiana.

1641650.name: Haley Jones
1641650.injDetail: Jones (coach's decision) is listed as out for Wednesday's game against Portland.

1643469.name: Indya Nivar
1643469.injDetail: Nivar (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Sunday's game against Chicago.

1643527.name: Jordan Harrison
1643527.injDetail: Harrison (coach's decision) is out for Wednesday's game against the Wings.

1643505.name: Jovana Nogic
1643505.injDetail: Nogic (not injury related) intends to play professionally in Russia and won't return to Phoenix this season, Aya Abdeen of TheIXSports.com reports.

1628276.name: Kelsey Plum
1628276.injDetail: Plum has suffered a lower left leg injury and will be re-evaluated in four weeks, Mitchell Hansen of CanisHoopus.com reports.

1631006.name: Kierstan Bell
1631006.injDetail: Bell (leg) is out for Wednesday's game against the Mystics.

1643445.name: Kiki Rice
1643445.injDetail: Head coach Sandy Brondello said Thursday that Rice (ankle) has progressed to doing non-contact work at practice but is doubtful to return before the All-Star break, Zulfi Sheikh of

1630142.name: Leonie Fiebich
1630142.injDetail: Fiebich (foot) currently doesn't have a timetable to return, Jackie Powell of The IX Sports reports.

1642820.name: Liatu King
1642820.injDetail: King (coach's decision) is out for Wednesday's game against the Storm.

1642818.name: Maddy Westbeld
1642818.injDetail: Westbeld (coach's decision) is out for Wednesday's game against the Liberty,

1629546.name: Marine Johannes
1629546.injDetail: Johannes (ankle) is out for Wednesday's game against the Sky, per Geoff Magliocchetti of Winsidr.

1631055.name: Nyara Sabally
1631055.injDetail: Sabally (ribs) has been ruled out for Monday's game against the Aces.

1643487.name: Quionche Carter
1643487.injDetail: Carter (coach's decision) is out for Wednesday's game against the Sparks.

1643433.name: Raven Johnson
1643433.injDetail: Johnson (lower body) is listed as out for Wednesday's game against Connecticut.

1642288.name: Rickea Jackson
1642288.injDetail: The Sky announced Tuesday that Jackson will miss the remainder of the season after suffering a torn ACL in her left knee during Sunday's 86-79 win over the Lynx.

1642790.name: Sania Feagin
1642790.injDetail: Feagin (knee) was diagnosed with a torn left ACL on Thursday and will miss the rest of the 2026 campaign, WNBA reporter Kareem Copeland reports.

1642782.name: Sarah Ashlee Barker
1642782.injDetail: Ashlee Barker (knee) will not return to Wednesday's game against the Wings, WNBA reporter Eddie Perez reports.

1643470.name: Shay Ciezki
1643470.injDetail: Ciezki (coach's decision) is out for Wednesday against the Sparks.

203400.name: Skylar Diggins
203400.injDetail: Head coach Tyler Marsh said Tuesday that Diggins (knee) is without a timetable for a return, Alissa Hirsh of the Chicago Sun-Times reports.

1643444.name: Ta'Niya Latson
1643444.injDetail: Latson (coach's decision) is out for Wednesday's game against the Mystics.

1643473.name: Taina Mair
1643473.injDetail: Mair (coach's decision) is out for Wednesday against the Lynx.

1642804.name: Te-Hina Paopao
1642804.injDetail: Paopao (leg) has been ruled out for Sunday's game against the Sky.
